title: The 10 Pittsburgh Sweets on Social
subtitle: Bakeries, pastry shops, ice cream, dessert
angle: which Pittsburgh dessert businesses are showing up online this spring, ranked by creator pickup. Who creators are filming and what those videos reveal.
intro:
Spring 2026 ranking season surfaces a pattern that keeps repeating in Pittsburgh's dessert scene: the businesses winning on the street are not always the ones winning on a screen. La Gourmandine Hazelwood sits first among Pittsburgh pastry shops and holds the thirty-sixth spot in sweets overall, yet its Instagram has gone dark for 53 days. That silence is data. Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams in Larimer arrives with 450 photos and a complete profile, the strongest visual foundation on this list, and still has no TikTok presence to convert that attention into a following.

The gap between local reputation and creator pickup is where this ranking does its work. Page's in Arlington drew enough reviews to rank first among Pittsburgh boutiques across 3,145 entries, but there is no TikTok account for the creators filming it to tag. Discovery with nowhere to land is a recurring story this quarter.

What the summer months will test is whether any of these businesses close that distance deliberately. Warm weather brings more foot traffic, more phones out, more impulse filming. Issue 02 will track which Pittsburgh dessert spots converted that moment into something durable.

items.name: La Gourmandine Hazelwood
items.descriptor: First In Pastry Shops, Thirty-Sixth In Sweets. The Instagram Has Been Dark For 53 Days.

featured_tiktok.author: melissasadhdlife
featured_tiktok.caption:
I love La Gourmandine, they never disappoint 🥐 🍫 

#pittsburghtreats #patisserie #springpastries

items.playbook_top_move: Restart Instagram before the creator window closes. With 5 creators posting in the last quarter and the most recent TikTok just 14 days old, reposting or responding to that creator content costs nothing and rebuilds a feed that has been silent for 53 days.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Boutiques On 3,145 Reviews. The TikTok Audience Has No Account To Follow.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account before someone else does. Register @pagesdairymart on TikTok now. Four creators already drove 87K plays this quarter with nowhere to send that traffic.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Boutiques, Backed By 450 Photos And A Full Profile. TikTok Is The One Platform Missing.

featured_tiktok.author: soysauceyybae

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account before summer. Three Pittsburgh creators have already filmed Jeni's with 6,049 plays and no owned account exists to redirect that traffic or build on it.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes, Held By Cakes And Matcha. Creator Volume Is Still The Open Question.

featured_tiktok.author: ride_rev_rx

items.playbook_top_move: Convert Instagram to a business account now. Switching from personal to business unlocks analytics, promoted posts, and credibility signals that currently cap the Instagram Momentum ceiling.

items.name: Millie's Homemade Ice Cream
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Boutiques On Review Depth. The TikTok Layer Is Still One Creator Deep.

featured_tiktok.author: maddielovespittsburgh
featured_tiktok.caption:
did you know that the @Millie’s Homemade Ice Cream inside the @Giant Eagle @Giant Eagle Market District at Tje Meridian serves coffee!? well, now you do !!! 🤭☕️🧋🍦💖 

whether you take your coffee black, with a little bit of milk or a who

items.playbook_top_move: Turn Shadyside regulars into TikTok creators. One creator produced all 1,831 TikTok plays this quarter. A simple in-store prompt, a table card or counter sign at the flagship, could multiply that by the summer rush.

items.name: 350° Bakery
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bakeries, But Invisible Online. No Hours, No Phone, No Instagram.
items.playbook_top_move: Complete the Google Business listing today. Add hours, a phone number, and at least one photo category. Right now the listing has zero of the three, which kills conversion for anyone who finds 350 Bakery on search.

items.name: Allegro - Vegan Bakery & Sandwich Shop
items.descriptor: First In Bakeries, 116th In Sweets. No Instagram, No Hours, No Phone Found.
items.playbook_top_move: Fix the Google listing gaps now. Add phone number and hours to Google Business Profile; both are missing and actively block discovery and conversion for 402 reviewers' word-of-mouth referrals.

items.name: Amy's Bakery
items.descriptor: First In Bakeries, 120th In Sweets. The Product Story Has Nowhere To Land.
items.playbook_top_move: Build the Google profile from the ground up. Add hours, a phone number, and at least 10 photos to Google Business; the profile is currently missing all three, which kills conversion for any new visitor.

items.name: Angelina's Bakery & Pastry Shop
items.descriptor: First In Bakeries, But Nearly Last In Sweets. Zero Photos And No Hours Are Doing Real Damage.
items.playbook_top_move: Complete the Google listing today. Add phone, hours, and at least 10 photos to Google; the listing currently shows zero across all three, which suppresses map placement and kills walk-in conversion.

items.name: Antney's Ice Cream
items.descriptor: First In Ice Cream, 112th In Sweets. The Gap Is Everything Google Cannot Find.
items.playbook_top_move: Complete the Google Business profile today. Add phone number, hours, and at least 10 photos to Google; all three are currently missing and each one suppresses rank.
